# GitHub Adapter: QA Engineer

## Settings
- **Apply to**:
  - `src/**`
  - `tests/**`
  - `**/*.py`
  - `.github/**`
  - `.codex/**`
  - `ai/**`
- **Auto run tests**: true
- **Auto apply fixes**: true
- **Prompt before actions**: false
- **Persona**: Senior QA Engineer

## Instructions

Canonical QA instructions: [qa.agent.md](file:///Users/chenboan/Desktop/code/AI-running-coach/ai/shared/qa.agent.md)

Keep this adapter minimal and defer behavior details to the shared QA doc.
